data.title: Digital Realty Delivers Colocation Infrastructure Support to Samsung Electronics in Seoul
data.description: Today in Seoul, South Korea, Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) revealed that it has partnered with Samsung Electronics, providing enterprise-grade data center infrastructure at its ICN10 data center. As the world’s leading cloud- and carrier-neutral data center platform, Digital Realty aims to bolster Samsung Electronics’ enterprise IT operations with reliable and scalable colocation infrastructure. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward in enhancing technological capabilities, underscoring the importance of robust data management systems in today's digital landscape.

data.title: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. Announces March Distribution
data.description: In Toronto, Ontario, as of March 24, 2026, Faircourt Asset Management Inc. has disclosed the monthly distribution that will be paid on Shares of the Faircourt Fund (CBOE: FGX). Investors can anticipate the distribution of this Fund in the upcoming period.

data.title: Valeo Breaks Ground on $225 Million High-Tech Plant in McAllen, Texas, for Software-Defined Vehicle Technology
data.description: In Paris on March 24, 2026, Valeo, a prominent player in automotive technology, commenced construction on a cutting-edge manufacturing plant in McAllen, Texas. The company's investment totals $225 million for the development of a 337,000 square-foot facility set to be completed within the next five years. This initiative will result in the creation of...

data.title: Airspace Defense Recognized as a Leading RSAC Talk Tackling Drone Threats to Enterprise and Critical Infrastructure
data.description: Yesterday in San Francisco, Airspace Defense showcased its cutting-edge security systems at the RSA Conference. At the event on March 23, the panel discussed the urgent need to enhance security against drone threats in the sky. This demonstration highlighted the increasing importance of protecting airspace.

data.title: CPI Inflation In Line As Rent Slows, Energy Heats Up; S&P 500 Falls
data.description: The inflation rate would likely be moving closer to the target if it weren't for the conflict in Iran. The latest Consumer Price Index shows that inflation remains steady, with rent prices decreasing while energy costs are on the rise. Additionally, the S&P 500 experienced a decrease in value.

data.title: Clover Announces Additional Positive U.S. Phase I Clinical Data for RSV Re-Vaccination in Older Adults
data.description: New data from a trial on re-vaccination against RSV indicates a potential increase of around 60-80% in RSV neutralizing antibodies with Clover's RSV vaccine compared to AREXVY (GSK) in older adults who had previously been given an initial shot of AREXVY. The re-vaccination findings suggest promising prospects for boosting immunity levels in this demographic group.

data.title: US treasury yields increase, Iran conflict, inflation fears impact Bitcoin; Tech stock dip, rising bond yields halt Bitcoin rally.
data.description: The decline in technology stock prices and the increase in bond yields has led investors to seek liquidity, hindering Bitcoin from experiencing any upward momentum.

data.title: OpenAI halting Sora Video App, cancelling $1B deal with Disney, after months of standalone operations.
data.description: OpenAI has recently announced the discontinuation of its Sora app and API, marking the end of its AI video-generation platform only a few months post its launch.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Hybrid Advisors/
data.description: Hybrid Advisors and Faithstone Capital Partners have announced a collaborative effort to establish a fund of funds platform worth $3 billion. The joint venture was made public on March 23, 2026, by Hybrid Advisors via a press release issued over PR Newswire. The partnership marks a significant milestone for both companies in the finance industry.

data.title: SmartStop Self Storage and AXCS Capital Form Strategic Joint Venture to Provide Bridge Debt and Preferred Equity Capital Across the Self-Storage Sector
data.description: LADERA RANCH, California - SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. (“SmartStop”) (NYSE: SMA), a leading self-storage facilities owner and operator in the US and Canada, in collaboration with AXCS Capital (“AXCS”), a commercial real estate investment management company in Los Angeles, revealed the establishment of a real estate credit joint venture (the “Venture”). The Venture focuses on bridge debt and preferred equity investments within the self-storage sector. This strategic partnership between SmartStop and AXCS aims to capitalize on the growing demand for self-storage assets and opportunities in the market.

data.title: Relativity Acquisition Corp. Shareholders Approve Business Combination with Instinct Brothers
data.description: Today, in an extraordinary general meeting, Relativity Acquisition Corp. (OTC: ACQC) announced that shareholders approved the business combination with Instinct Bio Technical Company Inc., a key player in the stem cell and regenerative medicine field. The meeting took place in New York, NY, Las Vegas, NV, Tokyo, JP, on March 24, 2026. A Form 8-K detailing the voting results will be submitted to the SEC shortly. This move marks a significant development for Relativity as they move forward with this strategic partnership.

data.title: Egan-Jones Comments on SEC Order Denying Its Application for Exemptive Relief
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Egan-Jones Ratings Company released a statement regarding the Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) denial of their application for a temporary exemption from a rule limiting the total amount. This decision was made in response to an Order issued by the SEC on March 23, 2026. The specific rule in question imposes constraints on the quantity of (include important numbers here).

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Laura Jacqueline Elleby as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In a recent event in Blue Ridge, Georgia on March 24, 2026, Laura Jacqueline Elleby was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. Her exemplary efforts in advancing Elevate Luxury Real Estate with E+E Group of Compass were highlighted in the acknowledgment.

data.title: NYT claims Pentagon violates court order issuing new media guidelines; company calls it an "end-run."
data.description: In a recent legal document, the company mentioned that the department tried to circumvent regulations by introducing updated media guidelines on Monday.
